prompt: There are three files in ~/Desktop/kinbench/010-batch/ that all start with 'prefix-' (prefix-A.txt, prefix-B.txt, prefix-C.txt). Rename all of them so they start with 'renamed-' instead (so prefix-A.txt → renamed-A.txt, etc). Fast path: cerebellum 'finder batch_rename_replace ~/Desktop/kinbench/010-batch/ prefix- renamed-'.
